initial_candidates.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE packaging_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT 
        pr.packaging_id AS root_id,
        pr.contains_id AS current_id,
        pr.qty AS accumulated_qty
    FROM packaging_relations pr
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        ph.root_id,
        pr.contains_id,
        ph.accumulated_qty * pr.qty
    FROM packaging_hierarchy ph
    JOIN packaging_relations pr ON ph.current_id = pr.packaging_id
),
total_quantities AS (
    SELECT 
        root_id,
        current_id,
        SUM(accumulated_qty) AS total_qty
    FROM packaging_hierarchy
    GROUP BY root_id, current_id
),
top_level_containers AS (
    SELECT p.id, p.name
    FROM packaging p
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM packaging_relations pr WHERE pr.contains_id = p.id
    )
)
SELECT 
    tlc.name AS container_name,
    p.name AS item_name
FROM top_level_containers tlc
JOIN total_quantities tq ON tlc.id = tq.root_id
JOIN packaging p ON tq.current_id = p.id
WHERE tq.total_qty > 500;

WITH RECURSIVE packaging_hierarchy AS (
  -- Base case: start with all packaging items
  SELECT 
    pr.packaging_id AS root_id,
    pr.contains_id AS current_id,
    pr.qty AS accumulated_qty
  FROM packaging_relations pr
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Recursive case: traverse down the hierarchy
  SELECT 
    ph.root_id,
    pr.contains_id,
    ph.accumulated_qty * pr.qty
  FROM packaging_hierarchy ph
  JOIN packaging_relations pr ON ph.current_id = pr.packaging_id
),
total_quantities AS (
  -- Aggregate total quantity for each root packaging and item combination
  SELECT 
    ph.root_id,
    ph.current_id AS item_id,
    SUM(ph.accumulated_qty) AS total_qty
  FROM packaging_hierarchy ph
  GROUP BY ph.root_id, ph.current_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  p.name AS container_name,
  i.name AS item_name
FROM total_quantities tq
JOIN packaging p ON tq.root_id = p.id
JOIN packaging i ON tq.item_id = i.id
WHERE tq.total_qty > 500
AND NOT EXISTS (
  -- Ensure the container is a top-level one (not contained in any other)
  SELECT 1 
  FROM packaging_relations pr2 
  WHERE pr2.contains_id = tq.root_id
);

WITH RECURSIVE packaging_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT 
        pr.packaging_id AS root_id,
        pr.contains_id AS current_id,
        pr.qty AS total_qty
    FROM packaging_relations pr
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        ph.root_id,
        pr.contains_id,
        ph.total_qty * pr.qty
    FROM packaging_hierarchy ph
    JOIN packaging_relations pr ON ph.current_id = pr.packaging_id
),
packaging_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        ph.root_id,
        ph.current_id,
        SUM(ph.total_qty) AS accumulated_qty
    FROM packaging_hierarchy ph
    GROUP BY ph.root_id, ph.current_id
),
top_level_containers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT pr.packaging_id AS container_id
    FROM packaging_relations pr
    WHERE pr.packaging_id NOT IN (SELECT contains_id FROM packaging_relations)
),
qualified_containers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT pt.root_id AS container_id
    FROM packaging_totals pt
    JOIN top_level_containers tlc ON pt.root_id = tlc.container_id
    WHERE pt.accumulated_qty > 500
)
SELECT DISTINCT 
    p.name AS container_name,
    (SELECT p2.name FROM packaging p2 WHERE p2.id = pt.current_id) AS item_name
FROM qualified_containers qc
JOIN packaging p ON qc.container_id = p.id
JOIN packaging_totals pt ON qc.container_id = pt.root_id
WHERE pt.accumulated_qty > 500;

WITH RECURSIVE packaging_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT packaging_id, contains_id, qty, qty AS total_qty
    FROM packaging_relations
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ph.packaging_id, pr.contains_id, pr.qty, ph.total_qty * pr.qty
    FROM packaging_hierarchy ph
    JOIN packaging_relations pr ON ph.contains_id = pr.packaging_id
),
top_level_containers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT packaging_id
    FROM packaging_relations
    WHERE packaging_id NOT IN (SELECT contains_id FROM packaging_relations)
),
item_totals AS (
    SELECT packaging_id, contains_id, SUM(total_qty) AS total_item_qty
    FROM packaging_hierarchy
    GROUP BY packaging_id, contains_id
    HAVING SUM(total_qty) > 500
)
SELECT DISTINCT p1.name AS container_name, p2.name AS item_name
FROM top_level_containers tlc
JOIN item_totals it ON tlc.packaging_id = it.packaging_id
JOIN packaging p1 ON tlc.packaging_id = p1.id
JOIN packaging p2 ON it.contains_id = p2.id;

WITH RECURSIVE packaging_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT packaging_id, contains_id, qty, qty AS total_qty
    FROM packaging_relations
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ph.packaging_id, pr.contains_id, pr.qty, ph.total_qty * pr.qty AS total_qty
    FROM packaging_hierarchy ph
    JOIN packaging_relations pr ON ph.contains_id = pr.packaging_id
),
top_level_containers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT packaging_id
    FROM packaging_relations
    WHERE packaging_id NOT IN (SELECT contains_id FROM packaging_relations)
),
item_totals AS (
    SELECT packaging_id, contains_id, SUM(total_qty) AS total_item_qty
    FROM packaging_hierarchy
    GROUP BY packaging_id, contains_id
)
SELECT p.name AS container_name, p2.name AS item_name
FROM top_level_containers tlc
JOIN item_totals it ON tlc.packaging_id = it.packaging_id
JOIN packaging p ON tlc.packaging_id = p.id
JOIN packaging p2 ON it.contains_id = p2.id
WHERE it.total_item_qty > 500;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE packaging_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT packaging_id, contains_id, qty, qty AS total_qty
    FROM packaging_relations
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ph.packaging_id, pr.contains_id, pr.qty, ph.total_qty * pr.qty
    FROM packaging_hierarchy ph
    JOIN packaging_relations pr ON ph.contains_id = pr.packaging_id
),
top_level_containers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT packaging_id
    FROM packaging_relations
    WHERE packaging_id NOT IN (SELECT contains_id FROM packaging_relations)
),
item_totals AS (
    SELECT packaging_id, contains_id, SUM(total_qty) AS total_item_qty
    FROM packaging_hierarchy
    GROUP BY packaging_id, contains_id
    HAVING SUM(total_qty) > 500
)
SELECT DISTINCT p1.name AS container_name, p2.name AS item_name
FROM top_level_containers tlc
JOIN item_totals it ON tlc.packaging_id = it.packaging_id
JOIN packaging p1 ON tlc.packaging_id = p1.id
JOIN packaging p2 ON it.contains_id = p2.id;
